mechanism: At $36T+ debt, every 100bp rate hike adds ~$250-320B in annual interest expense. 10-25% of this is recycled into demand via interest income to bondholders through the Kalecki channel, partially offsetting the contractionary intent of monetary tightening and creating a self-defeating feedback loop.
regime_dependence: Scales with debt/GDP ratio; becomes dominant transmission impairment above ~100% debt/GDP. At current levels, neutralizes roughly 10-25% of each rate hike's contractionary intent.
